description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty military-style toolbox with a rugged, rectangular form and reinforced corners. The exterior is olive drab green, featuring molded ribs for structural strength and durability. Prominent metal handles are mounted on the short ends, and there are multiple black metal latches on the front for secure closure. Stenciled yellow and white alphanumeric markings, including serial numbers and handling instructions, are visible on the front face. The box appears to be constructed from thick, molded plastic or composite material, likely with a hollow interior for tool storage. Its robust design suggests it is intended for demanding environments such as garages, workshops, or field operations.
description: A large, olive green, military-style toolbox with reinforced corners, metal handles, and multiple latches, featuring stenciled markings on the front.
description_view_0: End view showing a single metal handle and reinforced corners, with minimal visible markings.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two metal latches, stenciled serial numbers, and handling instructions, as well as the main access panel.
description_view_2: Opposite end view similar to view 0, with a handle and some stenciled text visible near the base.
description_view_3: Rear view with two latches and stenciled markings, but less labeling than the front.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed metal handles with a rounded grip, mounted on each short end for carrying; no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two black metal clasp latches on the front, likely spring-loaded for secure closure; no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the size and design; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
